name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Security Tool Process Information
notes: This building block detects when an audit message records information about a Critical Security Tool as a response to it's PID being targeted by another signal.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Security Tool Process Information on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.General Audit Event
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is not N/A
when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Critical Security Tool Processes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Security Tool Process Information on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.General Audit Event
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is not N/A
AND when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Critical Security Tool Processes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
